name: Harbor Village BBQ Pork
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Harbor Village Chef's BBQ Marinade
2 tablespoons Mui Gwe Lo rice wine
recipeInstructions:
BBQ MARINADE
2/3 cup Cooking oil
8 Garlic cloves, peeled and minced
1 3/4 cups Hoisin sauce
1 3/4 cups Ground bean sauce
1 1/4 cups Sugar
1/2 cup "nam yu" (red bean curd cheese)
1/2 cup Sesame seed paste
GLAZING SAUCE
17-1/2 ounces Container of maltose sugar
1/4 cup Hot water
2 tablespoons Mui Gwe Lo rice wine
Combine the ingredients for the BBQ marinade in a large bowl and mix well. Add the pork butt and marinate for about 30 minutes (if using spareribs, marinate for 1 hour). Preheat the oven to 500°F. Pour the water into a roasting pan and place the rack inside. Place the marinated meat on the rack and roast for 8 minutes on one side, then flip and roast for another 8 minutes on the other side. Reduce the temperature to 300°F and brush the pork with the reserved marinade. Roast for an additional 20 minutes on each side. Let cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
Slice the pork into 1/4-inch slices. To prepare the glazing sauce, place the maltose sugar in a microwave-safe container and heat for 1 minute. Transfer to a double boiler with water and rice wine, stirring until well mixed. Brush the glaze over the pork just before serving.
